notes: Official route material confirms LZB on the western high-speed section.
Included German rolling stock uses PZB and Sifa where applicable.
Dovetail's gameplay guide includes LZB training and GNT/NeiTech information for the ICE-T.
High-speed operation requires LZB-capable stock; exact service-by-service use remains to be recorded.

cautions: A route supporting a system does not mean every train or service uses it.
Train-specific activation, displays and controls require separate rolling-stock records.
These links confirm system presence, not every transition point or in-game implementation detail.
